per_question.question_text: Can you explain the difference between a LEFT JOIN and an INNER JOIN in SQL, and give me a simple business scenario where you'd choose one over the other?
per_question.answer_text: तो basically inner join रिटर्न्स only the record that have matching values in both table मतलब दोनों table में अगर matching values हो तो वो inner join होता है। And the left join is return all record from the left table and the matching records from the right table. If there is no match null values are return For the right table column. बोल अब इसमें example है customer tables, order tables। And the business scenario is marketing teams of the news left channels To identify customer for re-engagement campaigns.
per_question.develop: provide more specific business scenarios and technical details
per_question.fix: practice answering technical questions in English to improve clarity and confidence

per_question.question_text: Your resume mentions your work at KAS Marine contributed to a 5% improvement in fuel efficiency recommendations. Can you walk me through exactly how you analyzed the vessel performance data and what specific trend you found that led to this recommendation?
per_question.answer_text: या I first First clean the data set by removing duplicate, handling missing values and standardizing units. Using Excel and Power BI, I create dashboards to analyze fuel consumption. Across Roots and Basal Types. I discovered that certain vessels operating above Optimal speed Consistently Consume Disp इस proportionally higher fuel वह highlighting this trends and recommending maintaining speeds with an optimal range The team was able to improve fuel efficiency by 5 बॉक्स में।
per_question.develop: providing more specific technical details about the analysis and trends found
per_question.fix: practice clearly articulating technical concepts and avoiding filler words

per_question.question_text: Our JD and your resume both mention SQL window functions. Can you tell me about a time you used a window function, like RANK() or LAG(), to answer a specific business question that would have been difficult to solve otherwise?
per_question.answer_text: Yes. मैंने इसे RCB या IPL प्रोजेक्ट Project में use किया है। I use the rank window function. टू रैंक बैट्समैन बेस्ड ऑन टोटल रन्स स्कोर्ड ईच सीजन। यह help करता है identify top performer Performer season wise. I also use lag function To compare current season performance with previous season. which would have been difficult using traditional joints.
per_question.develop: Provide more technical details and avoid using filler words
per_question.fix: Clearly articulate the business question and the SQL query used to solve it

per_question.question_text: In Excel, what's the purpose of a Pivot Table, and can you walk me through the basic steps to create one from a raw dataset?
per_question.answer_text: Yes. Pivot With table help summarize, analyze and exploit large data sets quickly without Writing formulas means अगर आप को formula के सिवाय और कुछ कुछ चाहिए मतलब पिवट टेबल एनालाइज चाहिए तो आप पिवट टेबल का उपयोग कर सकते हो। For example if I have sales data containing date, products, region, And revenue I can instantly see total sales by region or monthly trends. और इसको बनाने का 1 आसान सा तरीका है जैसे कि Select data set Right Go to Insert, Select Pivot Table, Choose the data range and location Drag fields into row, column, values, filters. Customize aggregation such as sum, count और average.
per_question.strengths: clear explanation of pivot table purpose and creation steps
per_question.develop: improve clarity in initial responses and minimize use of filler words
per_question.fix: practice providing concise and structured answers to technical questions

per_question.question_text: In your KAS Marine internship, your resume lists '[Excel / Power BI / Tableau]' for the dashboards you developed. Which specific tool did you primarily use, and why was that tool chosen for visualizing KPIs like voyage duration and route efficiency?
per_question.answer_text: I choose Power BI because I primarily use Power BI because It was chosen 2 हैंडल large data से Efficiently It Offer Interactive Active Dashboards Stakeholder could filter and drill down into KPS It Provides easy integration with Excel. KPI such as voice duration, root efficiency, and fuel consumption were displayed using cards, line charts, bar charts and slicer for interactive analysis.
per_question.develop: Provide more details on data cleaning and preprocessing steps
per_question.fix: Clearly articulate the benefits of chosen tool in the initial answer to avoid repetition

per_question.question_text: The job description mentions SQL subqueries. Can you describe a situation where using a subquery would be more effective than using a JOIN?
per_question.answer_text: और इसके ऊपर सब सब क्यूरीज इसका उपयोग मतलब it is useful when the result of one query is needed to filter Another query. अब इसका example दे सकते हैं। Okay Find employee earning above salary average. Using a join Here would be unnecessary complex. सो आप अब queries make सच Compression similar and more readable.
per_question.develop: provide clear and concise examples, avoid mixing languages and unclear explanations
per_question.fix: practice explaining technical concepts in a straightforward and structured manner, focusing on the specific question asked

per_question.question_text: Tell me about the main components of a Power BI dashboard. What's the difference between a report and a dashboard in that context?
per_question.answer_text: Power BI components के dashboard है पहला तो visualization दूसरा data set 3rd रिपोर्ट Tiles Dashboards, Filters and Sliders. और इन सब का जो difference है एक That is a report consist of multiple pages which interact Attractive visuals. अ dashboard इज अ single page Overview created by Pinning visuals from one or more reports. मतलब dashboard मैं में एक पूरा आपको visualization मिल सकता है। reports के बगैर
per_question.develop: clarity and specificity in explaining Power BI concepts, avoiding off-topic drift and focusing on precise definitions
per_question.fix: practice explaining technical terms like 'report' and 'dashboard' in Power BI, using clear and concise language to improve confidence in answers

per_question.question_text: For your RCB-IPL SQL project, you mentioned writing complex queries. Can you describe the most complex query you wrote? What tables were involved, what specific question were you trying to answer, and what was the biggest challenge you faced in getting it to work correctly?
per_question.answer_text: हाँ तो तो yes I have One complex queries involved identifying players तो consistently perform across multiple season। और इसमें मैंने use किया था matches, deliveries and players. The query involved multiple joint cities Aggregate functions, Pinto function. Example business question होगा तो तो which player ranked in the top 10 scores For at least 3 consecutive seasons. The biggest challenge was ensuring aggregation without duplicate counting. Because deliveries that exist at ball level. I resolve this by carefully grouping data at the match and season will before applying ranking function.
per_question.develop: Providing more specific details about the query structure and performance optimization
per_question.fix: Practice explaining technical concepts in a clear and concise manner, avoiding filler words and phrases

per_question.question_text: Imagine you've built a dashboard for the sales team. How would you go about ensuring the data is accurate and that the team trusts the numbers they're seeing?
per_question.answer_text: डेटा की accuracy को trust करने के लिए बहुत से factors रहते हैं, उसमें से Validate Source data from हाँ। Stakeholders Cross Check Dashboard Matrix Against Row Data Compare Dashboard Totals With existing reports Test calculation using simple records परफॉर्म UAT, UAT मतलब user Acceptance Testing डॉक्यूमेंट KPI definitions clearly Schedule Periodic Data Valuation Checks. तो ये कुछ कुछ से steps हैं। जिससे हम accuracy को trust कर सकते हैं।
per_question.develop: off-topic drift into non-English phrases, focus on technical aspects
per_question.fix: use standardized technical terms and provide concrete examples

per_question.question_text: This role involves cleaning data from multiple sources. What are some of the most common data quality issues you've encountered or would expect to encounter?
per_question.answer_text: Yes तो तो common issues include missing values Duplicate records Incorrect data types, inconsistent formats, Outliers, Null Values, Typographical Error Inconsistent Naming Conventions Invalid Entries Example की बात करें तो मेरे internship के time पे I found special names recorded in multiple format like MV, Ocean Star, Ocean Star. and m.v.oceanstar. I understand this using Excel and Power Queries before analyzing.
per_question.develop: Off-topic drift in initial answer, improve clarity and concision
per_question.fix: Focus on directly addressing the question with relevant examples from experience
